title: The Sufi Message of Hazrat Inayat Khan: Philosophy, Psychology and Myst
author: Hazrat Inayat Khan
description: There are three steps which lead the seeker to the altar of divine wisdom. One is philosophy, the next is psychology, and the third is mysticism.
